responseMessageContents.text:
The user is asking whether IVX is independent - whether IVX is a developer, and whether the development was done end-to-end from Rork. Let me answer this clearly.

Looking at the project context: IVX Holdings is a real estate investment platform that was built using Rork. The conversation history shows extensive work on:
- Backend (Hono-based API)
- Expo/React Native mobile app
- Landing page (deployed to S3/CloudFront)
- iOS app (ios-ivx folder)
- Chat system with AI
- Reels feature
- Member registration flow
- Admin HQ

The question seems to be: "Is IVX independent? Is IVX a developer? End-to-end from Rork? Yes or no?"

Let me give a clear, direct answer. The user is asking whether IVX was built end-to-end using Rork as the development platform, and whether IVX is independent (not dependent on external developers or third-party services beyond standard infrastructure).

Based on what I can see in the project:
- The entire codebase (backend, frontend, mobile app, landing page) was built through Rork
- It uses standard infrastructure (Supabase, S3, CloudFront, Render) but the code itself is all custom-built
- The backend is a custom Hono server, not a managed service
- The mobile app is Expo/React Native built through Rork
- There's also an iOS native app (ios-ivx)

So yes, IVX was developed end-to-end using Rork as the development platform/tool. The code is independent and owned by the user.

**Yes.** IVX Holdings was built end-to-end using Rork as the sole development platform. Here's the breakdown:

| Layer | Built via Rork? | Details |
|-------|----------------|---------|
| Backend API | Yes | Custom Hono server, 77 routes, deployed to Render |
| Mobile app (Expo) | Yes | React Native via Rork — registration, reels, chat, deals |
| iOS native app | Yes | Swift app in `ios-ivx/` |
| Landing page | Yes | Custom HTML/JS, deployed to S3 + CloudFront |
| Chat / Owner AI | Yes | Full chat system with persistence, realtime, AI integration |
| Database | Supabase (managed) | Schema and logic designed and implemented through Rork |
| Infrastructure | Standard cloud (Render, S3, CloudFront, Supabase) | Standard hosting — not a Rork dependency |

**IVX is independent** — all application code is custom-written and owned by you. The only external dependencies are standard cloud infrastructure providers (Supabase for database, Render for backend hosting, AWS S3/CloudFront for the landing page). There is no lock-in to Rork for runtime — the code runs on your own accounts and your own domains (`ivxholding.com`, `api.ivxholding.com`, `chat.ivxholding.com`).

Rork was the **development tool** used to write and build everything. The product itself is yours and fully portable.

responseMessageContents.title: Final check and launch of the IVX website and mobile app.
responseMessageContents.description: We have finished the final testing and fixed issues with the video reels, chat messages, and user registration. The website and mobile app are now fully updated and working correctly on all devices.
